title: coryanthes pilosa
intro: Coryanthes pilosa is a rare and endangered orchid species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, characterized by its unique, funnel-shaped flowers and ability to trap and digest insects to supplement its nutrient intake. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coryanthes pilosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant and anti-inflammatory relief. In herbal preparations, Coryanthes pilosa is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications and risks.
